name: Metal Storage Rack - Brightroom™: Black Iron Utility Shelf, Garage Storage, 57.875" H, 42.25" W, 50 lb Capacity
description:
Help keep your space organized with the Metal Storage Rack from Brightroom™. This freestanding floor rack provides multifunctional storage with a universal storage bin, four hanging hooks, a small shelf, and an adjustable basket and rail. This flexible storage option easily fits into the decor of your home gym, garage, and more with an iron frame and wood accents.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
